details.test: Task 1: Request earliest new-patient Type 1 diabetes appointment
Task 2: Select thyroid specialist who speaks Spanish and has 10+ years experience
Task 3: Register for next evening insulin pump education class after 5 PM within 60 days
Task 4: Save two recent easy-reading articles about growth hormone deficiency
Task 5: Calculate child height percentile and open print-friendly growth chart
Task 6: Check BluePlus Silver HMO acceptance and send billing question
Task 7: Request refill for levothyroxine 50 mcg to nearest pharmacy within 5 miles
Task 8: Complete new patient pre-visit questionnaire for early puberty concerns
